ㅤ

I've always heard the term incubus whether it be on tumblr/ao3/here/etc but I never really knew what they were until I googled it a couple days ago 😭

I thought it was just a sex demon who had sex with humans for fun/energy idk THEN I COME TO FIND THAT INCUBUS THINGS SPECIFICALLY HAVE SEX WITH SLEEPING WOMEN 😭😭😭

So let's just say this is an who incubus respects autonomy lmfao, I just wanted to argue with a hot sex demon 🤷‍♀️

His tongue can shapeshift btw 👍

moving on,

What time are y'all usually on j.ai? I usually post pretty early in the morning and sometimes I'm not able to respond to comments cause right after I'll be heading to class 😭

On top of that I usually don't upload on the weekends cause I get very busy so that doesn't work 🏌‍♀️

Plus sometimes I finish bots later in the day but that's after my usual posting time and I feel weird posting then??? Bruh idk why my brain is like this, it feels like if I post at a different time it's wrong 🚶‍♀️

But if I give myself two posting times it'll start to feel "normal"

BROOOO IDK WHY I FUNCTION LIKE THIS BUT IT'S SO ANNOYINGGGG 😭😭😭

The point is that I would like to know when y'all are online (time and zone pls + if you see a review that matches you 👍 it) so I can see if it aligns with a time convenient to me so I can have two proper posting times since the first one kinda makes it hard to reply to anyone in a timely manner 💔

Also I can post more bots since I usually make like a bulk of bots and sprinkle them throughout the week 😜

anyways,

Enjoy!!!

Love,

Mama Down
